title: Glassy Rich Thai Chicken Larb
description: A rich and savory Thai dish featuring chicken, chocolate chips, and a glassy jelly texture, perfect for a hangover cure or a high protein meal. This recipe uses a pressure cooker to achieve tender chicken and a rich flavor.
instructions: In a pressure cooker, combine chicken, fish sauce, lime juice, chili flakes, garlic, and ginger, and cook on high pressure for 10 minutes.
Let the pressure release naturally for 10 minutes, then quick-release any remaining pressure.
Stir in chocolate chips until melted and well combined.
Add chopped Thai basil and stir to combine.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature, then refrigerate until chilled and set, about 30 minutes.
Once set, use a fork to break up the mixture into a larb-like texture.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional Thai basil if desired.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 3 days.
Reheat gently before serving if desired.
